title: A Day at Edinburgh Castle
synopsis: A school trip to Edinburgh Castle turns into a journey through Scottish history.
sentences: Ava visited Edinburgh Castle with her class on a windy autumn day.
The castle stood high on dark rock above the city.
As the group walked through the gate, Ava imagined soldiers and kings from long ago.
Their guide told them stories about battles, crowns, and hidden rooms.
Inside one hall, they saw old weapons and shining suits of armour.
From the walls, Ava could see rows of rooftops and hills in the distance.
At lunchtime, the students sat together and ate near the courtyard.
A sudden gust of wind almost blew one boy's map away.
Before leaving, they listened to the sound of a bagpipe player near the entrance.
Ava bought a postcard with the castle on the front.
That evening, she told her family that the castle had felt like a storybook made of stone.
